Callers: Manta + Delly + GRIDSS + Scramble + MELT + STRling. Single-caller DUP/INV excluded. gnomAD-SV v2.1 AF >1% flagged with badge (soft annotation).

Copy Number Variant (CNV) Summary
Total CNVs323
Deletions (DEL)290
Duplications (DUP)33
Both-caller consensus (HIGH)0
GATK-only (MEDIUM)36

BOTH = CNVpytor + GATK gCNV (reciprocal overlap ≥50%). MEDIUM = GATK gCNV quality ≥30, single caller. CNVs are research-grade: no orthogonal truth set and no per-call gene annotation. CNVs overlapping a known recurrent syndrome region are promoted to Clinical Findings above; the full list of 323 CNVs is in the companion .variants.xlsx.

Alpha-globin (HBA1/HBA2) — THAL2

α-globin dosage: 4 of 4 genes confidence: low

Genotype: aa/aa +HBA2:c.377:het — no large deletion detected by depth

DeletionNone detected by depth.
Supporting evidencejunction read
Point-mutation scanHb Quong Sze (HBA2 c.377), heterozygous.
Screened: α-gene dosage and named point mutations (Hb Constant Spring, Hb Quong Sze, Hb Adana).
Not examined: Beta-globin (HBB) was not examined by this module at all. Most beta-globin alleles are point mutations and are read from a germline VCF elsewhere.; Only the named positions in the pinned site panel were examined. Any alpha-globin sequence change outside that list was not looked for. Absence above is not the same as tested-and-absent — these were not examined here, so nothing about them can be ruled out.
Measurements only; no clinical interpretation is made here (interpretation_complete=false). Panel hba_pathogenic_sites.tsv@dfd6ccf.
